hero.title: AgroSense AI
hero.subtitle: Smart Decisions for Every Farm
hero.description: Event-driven AI advisory for small-scale farmers, combining weather signals, field observations, and actionable crop guidance in seconds.

snapshot.label: Live advisory snapshot
snapshot.title: North field recommendation
snapshot.recHint: Soil moisture is trending down while rainfall probability remains low.
snapshot.biHint: Farmers receive localized advice on both smartphones and low-bandwidth devices.
snapshot.guidanceValue: Advice designed for real field conditions

login.formDescription: Access your farm dashboard, latest recommendations, and real-time advisory updates.
login.panelTitle: Professional farm intelligence, ready when you are
login.panelDescription: API-backed authentication with persistent sessions and protected routes.
login.highlight1: Real-time advisory delivery with API-backed authentication.
login.highlight2: Mobile-first UI designed for farmers and evaluators.
login.highlight3: Persistent sessions so refreshes do not log users out.
login.highlight4: Bilingual experience for English and French workflows.
login.passkeyHint: Passkey uses your device biometric (fingerprint/face) where available.

register.formDescription: Start with a polished, fully validated onboarding flow connected directly to your backend.
register.panelTitle: Launch a smarter farming workflow from the first screen
register.panelDescription: API-backed account creation with persistent login and protected routes.
register.highlight1: Validated onboarding with react-hook-form and Zod.
register.highlight2: Inline feedback for cleaner, more confident form completion.
register.highlight3: API-backed account creation with persistent login.
register.highlight4: Language support for English and French user journeys.
